title: hieracium froelichianum subsp. beauverdianum
intro: Hieracium froelichianum subsp. beauverdianum, also known as Beauverd's Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Beauverd's Hawkweed is believed to possess health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions like arthritis, digestive issues, and even cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin for its potential therapeutic effects.
